long_description: Contemporary Amperex Technology Co. Limited is the world's largest manufacturer of lithium-ion battery cells for electric vehicles. CATL supplies battery packs to Tesla, BMW, Volkswagen, and other major EV manufacturers. The company specializes in NCM and LFP battery chemistry, battery management systems (BMS), and gigafactory-scale cell manufacturing. CATL is a tier 1 supplier to the global EV supply chain.
business_tags: lithium battery electric vehicle BMS gigafactory
specialties: NCM NCA LFP cell manufacturing battery packs

long_description: Northvolt is a European battery manufacturer focused on producing sustainable lithium-ion batteries for electric vehicles and energy storage. The company operates gigafactory facilities in Sweden and Germany, producing cathode and anode materials, electrolyte solutions, and complete battery modules for EV powertrain systems. Northvolt has raised over 8 billion USD in venture and growth funding.
business_tags: lithium EV battery gigafactory cathode anode electrolyte
specialties: solid state battery cell manufacturing electric vehicle

long_description: Stripe is a fintech company providing payment infrastructure for the internet. Founded in 2010, Stripe has raised over 9 billion USD across Series A through Series H funding rounds. The company offers API-first payment processing, lending products, embedded finance, and open banking integrations. Stripe is widely regarded as a high-growth fintech leader.
business_tags: fintech payment API embedded finance growth
specialties: payment processing lending BNPL open banking

long_description: Revolut is a neobank and digital bank offering payment, currency exchange, lending, and wealthtech services. The company raised 800 million USD in a Series E funding round and continues strong growth globally. Revolut offers crypto trading, BNPL services, and API-first banking integrations for consumers and businesses.
business_tags: neobank digital bank fintech payment lending growth

long_description: Bosch Automotive is a tier 1 supplier and OEM manufacturer of automotive components including fuel injection systems, braking systems, and electronic control units. The company holds ISO 9001 and IATF 16949 quality certifications and supplies components to all major automotive manufacturers worldwide. Bosch operates as a key player in automotive supply chain procurement.
specialties: ISO 9001 IATF supply chain procurement components parts

long_description: Denso is a global automotive component manufacturer and tier 1 supplier to Toyota and other OEMs. The company manufactures electronic systems, thermal systems, powertrain components, and industrial machinery parts. Denso holds AS9100 and ISO 9001 certifications and operates advanced manufacturing fabrication facilities across 35 countries.
business_tags: automotive supplier tier 1 OEM manufacturer industrial
specialties: AS9100 ISO 9001 supply chain fabrication parts components

long_description: McDonald's is a global fast food restaurant chain operating over 40,000 locations worldwide. The company franchises and operates quick-service restaurants serving burgers, fries, and beverages. McDonald's focuses on consumer retail food service and has no involvement in manufacturing, technology supply chains, or financial services.

QuantumScape is developing solid state battery technology for electric vehicles. Backed by Volkswagen, the company is working on lithium-metal anode batteries with solid electrolyte separators that promise higher energy density and faster charging for EV battery packs. QuantumScape has raised growth funding and is working toward cell manufacturing scale-up.
business_tags: solid state battery EV lithium electric vehicle
specialties: solid state anode electrolyte cell manufacturing

long_description: Klarna is a leading fintech and BNPL (buy now pay later) platform that has raised over 4 billion USD in funding across multiple Series rounds. The company provides embedded finance, payment solutions, and lending products to consumers and merchants worldwide. Klarna is an API-first open banking platform experiencing strong growth.
short_description: Buy now pay later fintech leader
business_tags: fintech BNPL payment lending growth funding
specialties: BNPL open banking API-first embedded finance

long_description: ZF Friedrichshafen is a global technology company and tier 1 supplier of automotive driveline and chassis technology. The company manufactures transmission systems, axles, steering, and safety electronics for automotive and industrial machinery OEMs. ZF holds ISO 9001 and IATF 16949 certifications and operates extensive supply chain and procurement operations.
business_tags: automotive tier 1 supplier OEM manufacturer industrial
specialties: IATF ISO 9001 supply chain parts components fabrication
